channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: TMC - Defects - Road Markings problem, 24th June
item.description:

Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Garden waste fly tipped into Hatherley brook near Kenelm Gardens, 24th June
item.description:
A resident in Kenelm Gardens has reported garden waste potentially blocking Hatherley Brook where it runs near the houses at 103 Shurdington Road and 21 Merestones Close. I have asked the residents of those two houses about this but they say they haven’t noticed anything. It’s difficult to get in to take a photo but there is a hole in the fence on the road next to 103. The resident is concerned this could lead to flooding.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 103, Shurdington Road, Warden Hill, Cheltenham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Obscures view, 24th June
item.description:
Obscures view when leaving Cold Slad Lane making it dangerous to pull out of the junction

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): A417, Badgeworth, Tewkesbury
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: TMC - Defects - Vegetation problem, 24th June
item.description:
Overgrown tree Please forward hedge letter 1 to Cheltenham Borough Council, or People responsible for maintenance of Pittville Park Trees from park at this location are overhanging and obscuring FW Please cut back to safe 20m (Overgrown Tree)
Report on FixMyStreet
